service_list.name: Roof Cleaning
service_list.brief: Pressure cleaning removes dirt, debris, mould and flaking paint so the roof is refreshed and ready for long-lasting coatings.

service_list.name: Roof Painting
service_list.brief: Roof painting gives the roof a vibrant new look while protecting it from the elements.

service_list.name: Roof Repair
service_list.brief: The team repairs roof issues such as broken tiles, persistent leaks, cracks, damaged flashing and other roof damage.

service_list.name: Roof Restoration
service_list.brief: Full roof restoration can include inspection, cleaning, repairs, rebedding, repointing and painting to revive the entire roof.

service_list.name: Leak Detection
service_list.brief: Weatherproof Restorations explicitly offers leak detection for homeowners needing roof issues identified.

service_list.name: Repointing
service_list.brief: The team offers repointing as part of roof maintenance, repair and restoration work.

service_list.name: Rebedding
service_list.brief: The team offers rebedding to help ensure the roof is properly sealed during restoration or repair.

service_list.name: Solar Panel Cleaning
service_list.brief: Weatherproof Restorations explicitly offers solar panel cleaning.

options.h1: Brisbane Roof Restorations Built For Queensland Weather
options.subhead: Protect your home with honest inspections, quality roof repairs, cleaning, painting and full restorations backed by decades of experience.

options.h1: Restore Your Roof Before Small Problems Become Costly
options.subhead: Weatherproof Restorations helps Brisbane Northside homeowners repair, clean and repaint tired roofs with transparent advice and reliable workmanship.

options.h1: Trusted Roof Repairs And Restorations Across South East Queensland
options.subhead: From leaks and broken tiles to full roof restorations, get practical guidance, careful workmanship and a free quote from a qualified local team.

items.name: Roof Cleaning
items.description: Remove built-up dirt, mould, debris and flaking paint with professional pressure cleaning that prepares your roof for longer-lasting protection.

items.name: Roof Painting
items.description: Refresh your roof’s appearance while adding a protective coating designed to help withstand Queensland sun, rain and storms.

items.name: Roof Repair
items.description: Fix leaks, broken tiles, cracked areas and damaged flashing before they turn into larger structural or water-damage problems.

items.name: Roof Restoration
items.description: Give an ageing roof a complete reset with inspection, cleaning, repairs, rebedding, repointing and a quality paint system.

items.name: Leak Detection
items.description: Find the source of roof leaks early so repairs can be targeted, practical and less disruptive.

items.name: Repointing
items.description: Restore worn pointing to help seal and strengthen roof ridge areas against water entry.

items.name: Rebedding
items.description: Reset loose or failing ridge capping to improve roof stability and prepare it for long-term protection.

items.name: Solar Panel Cleaning
items.description: Keep solar panels cleaner and better maintained as part of broader roof care.

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the strong local roofing positioning, real service list, Brendale contact details, warranty messaging, before-and-after proof, Nick Parry origin story, and the practical tone around honest inspections and no-pressure advice. Improve the inconsistent naming and experience claims, repeated header/form content, service hierarchy, mobile clarity, trust proof, testimonials gap, and conversion flow from inspection to quote. This redesign matters because the current site has useful credibility signals but buries them inside duplicated sections and uneven copy; a clearer structure can make Weatherproof Restorations feel more established, easier to trust, and easier to contact for urgent roof repair and restoration enquiries.

ready_to_build_concerns: No real customer testimonials were found in the supplied scrape despite trust-focused sections.
No ABN, QBCC or licence number was found in the supplied scrape.
Experience claims conflict across pages: 30+ years, over 25 years, 125 years combined and 250 years combined appear in different places.
Business name casing/spelling varies between Weatherproof, WeatherpRoof and Weather Proof.
Primary and accent brand colors were not reliably extractable from the supplied scrape.
WooCommerce/product route is present for the Colour Visualiser, so ecommerce/plugin requirements should be confirmed before rebuild.
The site references a booking or quote request, but no true scheduling system was detected.
